title: Puro R.A.P.
overview: Five young Panamanian freestyle artists fight to turn their craft into a way of life, as rap becomes their only voice in a country that doesn’t always listen.

title: last night was a movie
overview: Allan E. Smith is an aspiring filmmaker who admires influencers and content creators. As such, his inspirations grow increasingly stark when he decides to make a short film utilizing the vertical format.

title: Plátano Champion
overview: A summary of the Dominican Republic's undefeated championship run in the 2013 World Baseball Classic.

title: Gatto
overview: After years of maneuvering the canal-ridden, superstitious city, a black cat named Nero begins to question whether he’s lived the right lives. Indebted to a local feline mob boss, Nero finds himself in a quandary and is forced to forge a truly unexpected friendship that may finally lead him to his purpose—unless Venice gets the better of him first.

title: The Thomas Crown Affair
overview: In Europe, a bored young businessman decides to plan a robbery and assigns a professional agent with the right information to the job. However, he is soon betrayed yet cannot blow his cover as he’s fallen in love.

title: Ruslan and Ludmila: A Magical Journey
overview: The young knight Ruslan stands up for Lyudmila and spoils the plans of her father, Prince Vladimir, to marry her daughter to one of the worthy fellows – Ragday, Ratmir or Farlaf. Lyudmila falls in love with Ruslan, he is also fascinated by the beauty, but their happiness will not happen: Vladimir is against it, and then Lyudmila is completely kidnapped by the envious sorcerer Chernomor, eager to avenge the prince for past insults.

title: Sink Chicken
overview: The 1968 USAID foreign exchange group of South Vietnamese students attempt to adjust to life in a turbulent United States.

title: The Frog Princess 3
overview: Continuation of the franchise "The Frog Princess".

title: Oh Mom 2
overview: Sequel to the 2025 comedy Oh Mom!. Plot TBA

title: Doggies 2
overview: A sequel to the magnetic story about love for people and dogs, but now the focus is on the main character, who is a boy. There are even more animals, and not just dogs, and this time it's women that are turning into them!

title: Fish in a Barrel
overview: A group of friends devise a plan to avoid the workforce after graduating college. This plan however, could be detrimental to their lives.

title: Nemesis
overview: 20 years after meeting his identical twin with no explanation, a man finds that his brother is not all he seems.

title: The Mission 2
overview: the secend mission of the group who hacks and steal from rich people for money

title: BAHUBURA
overview: Mr. Teacher, a quiet and principled schoolteacher, is devastated after losing his only child in a tragic road accident. The very same day, at the accident site, he comes across another injured boy-abandoned, nameless, and unconscious. Everyone around looks the other way, but Mr. Teacher steps in to help. As he nurses the boy back to health, he discovers the child is a victim of a deeper evil-caught in the clutches of a trafficking network. What begins as an act of kindness becomes a mission of justice.

title: Sonic the Hedgehog 4
overview: Sonic the Hedgehog, joined by a new hero named Amy, faces a new technological nemesis known as Metal Sonic.

title: Untitled The Exorcist Film
overview: A small-town rookie detective takes on a case involving inconceivable darkness.

title: The Chosen: Crucifixion
overview: The sixth season finale of the popular Biblical television series, following Jesus' arrest and trial leading up to His crucifixion.

title: Threnodia
overview: A runaway couple takes on a journey of love, subconsciousness, and remorse; while believing that a homeless gay man is God.

title: BORN SEXY YESTERDAY: Decoding the Enigma of Beauty
overview: The phrase "Born Sexy Yesterday" is derived from the 1950 film "Born Yesterday." However beneath this superficial portrayal of some women lies a more complex understanding , revealing deeper narratives that resonate with many.  October 1, 1985. The chilling emptiness in Michele Avila's eyes. Her murder, a savage ballet of teenage fury, ripped through the town, festering wounds exposing the venomous underbelly of a seemingly innocent friendship. Jealousy, a serpent coiled in the heart of adolescence, struck with the force of a viper, revealing the terrifying depths of envy's reach. These weren't just girls; they were predators.  Women are born with many layers, a mix between good and evil. Ironically of all the positive tropes that can validate the existence of women, why is it that "Born Sexy Yesterday" is a trope that resonates with our male counterparts the most?

title: Street Fighter 8 (Finish Him)
overview: The final chapter. Balthasar turned all wimen on earth in to Merle and starts his conquest to rule the whole world. Nick and Luca the two only survivors of the deadly conflict angainst Balthasar, are trying to build a team that could stop the purple gigant from dominating the mordern world. Balthasar and the Boys are are pitted against each other in an epic battle that will determine the fate of Merle, Balthasar, the Boys and the future for even human beeing on earth.

title: Violette
overview: Violette Toussaint, a cemetery caretaker in a small town in Burgundy, is a unique observer and a compassionate listener. Her peaceful life is filled by conversations with quirky cemetery workers and the many visitors who share their stories of love, loss, and life. However, her routine is disrupted when a local police chief arrives at her door with an unusual request. As they grow closer, Violette comes to understand that the truth behind long-buried mysteries in her past must be uncovered if she wants to take another chance on life and, against all odds, love.

title: Dive 2: The Journey Continues
overview: Vignesh, a skilled swimmer, thinks winning in the pool is all he needs for success. But when his teammate Aanya quits swimming to focus on studies, he starts rethinking his choices. Struggling with school and swimming, Vignesh feels lost until his mom encourages him to find balance. With hard work, he improves in both and learns that real success comes from giving your best in all areas of life.

title: Godzilla x Kong: Supernova
overview: As the sixth installment in the MonsterVerse film series, this movie will delve deeper into the delicate relationship of coexistence and trust between humans and prehistoric behemoths. Meanwhile, the earth-shaking monster storm triggered by the epic clash between Godzilla and Kong, the two guardians of Earth’s ecological balance, will once again sweep across the big screen!

title: Winnie-the-Pooh and all-all-all
overview: Twelve-year-old Artyom discovers a portal to the magical Enchanted Forest at an abandoned dacha and meets its amazing inhabitants, Winnie the Pooh and his friends. But an attempt to show off his find to his peers turns into a disaster - Artyom is laughed at, because most people see ordinary toys rather than fairy-tale characters. The magic portal disappears, leaving Pooh and his friends in the human world. 20 years later, Artyom, who has forbidden himself to dream and has sunk into routine, finds Winnie the Pooh again, and with him a chance to return the lost meaning to his life. But to do this, they all have to find Piglet, Rabbit and Owl, scattered across different corners of the country, and send them all back to their native Enchanted Forest.

title: No Caller ID
overview: Meena, a young woman with a sixth sense and mild autism, is ostracised as a bearer of bad luck. When her suppressed dark alter ego awakens with terrifying supernatural power, she seeks vengeance against a transnational call centre crime syndicate.

title: Day Drinker
overview: A cruise ship bartender meets a mysterious day drinker, only for both of them to find themselves entangled in a criminal underbelly and connected in unexpected ways.

title: Rambo
overview: An action entertainer

title: Black Silk
overview: A sequel to the spy thriller Red Silk.

title: the tie around our fingers
overview: After breaking a blood pact, Iris feels the consequences of that decision in her own body and realizes that certain ties do not disappear when a relationship ends.

title: Roadie (Or The Inevitable and Ridiculous Fall of Danny And The Renaissances)
overview: Coen, an unpaid roadie financed solely by his belief in a quixotic guitarist, Danny, has his commitment strained to the elastic limit when the visionary continues to fail. Complicating things even more, he meets a bemusing young pregnant woman, Veronica, whose pursuit of happiness makes him question his own fulfillment and values.
